# Borg

> Personal AI assistant. Runs on your machine. Remembers you. Gets better over time. Ships as one binary with every integration compiled in. Data lives in `~/.borg/`.

- Source: https://github.com/borganization/borg
- License: MIT
- Docs: https://borganization.github.io/docs/

## Getting started

- [Install](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/getting-started/install.md): One-line curl installer, platform notes.
- [First run](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/getting-started/first-run.md): Onboarding, provider keys, personality seed.
- [Providers](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/getting-started/providers.md): OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenRouter, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Ollama, Claude Code CLI.

## Concepts

- [Agent loop](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/agent-loop.md): Turn structure, system prompt assembly, streaming, crash recovery.
- [Memory](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/memory.md): Long-term and working memory, hybrid vector+BM25 retrieval.
- [Plugins](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/plugins.md): Built-in native integrations and third-party skills, installed from one catalog.
- [Hooks](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/hooks.md): Lifecycle events with Claude Code / codex-compatible user scripts.
- [Workflows](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/workflows.md): Durable multi-step orchestration with per-step provider override.
- [Heartbeat](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/heartbeat.md): Proactive check-ins, quiet hours, dedup.
- [Self-healing](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/self-healing.md): Daily maintenance sweep, stall detection, tamper audit.
- [Sandboxing](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/sandboxing.md): macOS Seatbelt and Linux Bubblewrap for `run_shell` and script channels.
- [Collaboration modes](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/collaboration-modes.md): Default, Execute, Plan.
- [Projects](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/projects.md): Per-project memory and context scoping.
- [Vitals](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/vitals.md): Five-stat agent health model.
- [Prompt injection defense](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/prompt-injection-defense.md): Trust tiers and mitigations.
- [Channels](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/concepts/channels.md): Overview of native and script channels.

## Channels

- [Telegram](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/channels/telegram.md)
- [Slack](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/channels/slack.md)
- [Discord](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/channels/discord.md)
- [Microsoft Teams](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/channels/teams.md)
- [Google Chat](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/channels/google-chat.md)
- [Signal](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/channels/signal.md)
- [Twilio (WhatsApp, SMS)](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/channels/twilio.md)
- [iMessage (macOS only)](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/channels/imessage.md)

## Guides

- [Writing skills](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/guides/writing-skills.md)
- [Adding channels](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/guides/adding-custom-channels.md): Script channels via `channel.toml`.
- [Scheduling](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/guides/scheduling.md): Cron tasks, prompt tasks, workflows.
- [Migrating](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/guides/migrating.md)

## Reference

- [Commands](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/reference/commands.md): Slash commands and CLI flags.
- [Settings](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/reference/settings.md): SQLite-backed settings keys.
- [Hooks API](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/reference/hooks-api.md): User-script hook JSON schema.
- [Patch DSL](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/reference/patch-dsl.md): `apply_patch` grammar.
- [Architecture](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/reference/architecture.md): Workspace layout and invariants.

## Use cases

- [Developer copilot](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/use-cases/developer-copilot.md)
- [Personal assistant](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/use-cases/personal-assistant.md)
- [Research assistant](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/use-cases/research-assistant.md)
- [Ops bot](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/use-cases/ops-bot.md)
- [Home automation](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/use-cases/home-automation.md)
- [Cross-device notes](https://borganization.github.io/docs/content/use-cases/cross-device-notes.md)
